mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_set_snapshot ( evidence_set_snapshot_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, resolution_id, purpose, member_count, content_digest, eligibility_summary, created_by, created_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{snapshotId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{resolutionId} AS uuid), #{purpose}, #{memberCount}, #{contentDigest}, CAST(#{eligibilitySummary} AS jsonb), #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO evd_evidence_set_member ( member_id, tenant_id, evidence_set_snapshot_id, project_id, task_id, slot_id, evidence_item_id, evidence_revision_id, revision_number, revision_status, content_digest, validation_digest, member_ordinal) VALUES ( CAST(#{memberId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{snapshotId} AS uuid), CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid), CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid), CAST(#{evidenceRevisionId} AS uuid), #{revisionNumber}, #{revisionStatus}, #{contentDigest}, #{validationDigest}, #{memberOrdinal})
mapper.select: SELECT evidence_set_snapshot_id AS "snapshotId", task_id AS "taskId", project_id AS "projectId", resolution_id AS "resolutionId", purpose AS "purpose", member_count AS "memberCount", content_digest AS "contentDigest", eligibility_summary::text AS "eligibilitySummary", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM evd_evidence_set_snapshot WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_set_snapshot_id = CAST(#{snapshotId} AS uuid)

SELECT member_id AS "memberId", slot_id AS "slotId", evidence_item_id AS "evidenceItemId", evidence_revision_id AS "evidenceRevisionId", revision_number AS "revisionNumber", revision_status AS "revisionStatus", content_digest AS "contentDigest", validation_digest AS "validationDigest", member_ordinal AS "memberOrdinal" FROM evd_evidence_set_member WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_set_snapshot_id = CAST(#{snapshotId} AS uuid) ORDER BY member_ordinal
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_command_result ( tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, result_id) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{resultId} AS uuid)) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
